El baño en buenas condiciones, limpio.
Ideal para cargar agua caliente y/o combustible.
Comprar algo para el viaje o tomar algo en el lugar.

Ideal for filling up with hot water and/or fuel.
Buy something for your trip or grab a drink there.

reviews.comment:
Es cierto, hay moscas. La cokda es poca y fea. Pedí unas empanadas, las sacaron de uma heladera y las REcalentaron en microondas. Parecían de goma

(Translated by Google)
It's true, there are flies. The food is scarce and bad. I ordered some empanadas, they took them out of the refrigerator and reheated them in the microwave. They tasted like rubber.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnN19EeVlREAE

reviews.comment:
Fui a comer y tienen menú del día con postre y bebida a 14 dólares tomando de referencia 1000 pesos el dólar

(Translated by Google)
I went to eat and they have a daily menu with dessert and a drink for 14 dollars, using 1000 pesos per dollar as a reference.
